title: Navigation Assistant
description: This mod adds a particle line that can lead you to desired coordinates, via new commands.
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
<hr>

**Mod Description**

**Navigation Assistant** is a client-sided Minecraft mod for the **Fabric Loader**, that adds a line (made of golden/yellow dust particles), that goes all the way to the coordinates of your choice. To spawn in and make the line point to where you want to go, you need to run one of the commands this mod adds.

**--Commands--**

**/navigationstart** <x> <y> <z> - 'spawns' a line that goes to the coordinates that you type in (where the placeholders are).

**/navigationstop** - stops navigating and removes the line.

**/navigationsetpathpoints** <particlecount> - sets the amount of particles/path points the line will have in total (up to 10,000 particles allowed).

For a visual of this mod, please play the **Mod Demonstration Video** below, or visit this mod's **Gallery Tab**.

<hr>

**Mod Demonstration Video**
